scripts.typecheck: npm -w @stocktrace/core run build && npm -w @stocktrace/web run typecheck && npm -w @stocktrace/mobile run typecheck
scripts.lint: npm -w @stocktrace/core run lint && npm -w @stocktrace/web run lint && npm -w @stocktrace/mobile run lint
scripts.build: npm -w @stocktrace/core run build && npm -w @stocktrace/web run build
